summary: GoPool rebrand + monochrome theme + My Rides tab refactor verified end-to-end. Backend: 21/21 pytest tests pass — added 4 new TestMyRides cases (unauth 401, driver upcoming shape, passenger booking shows up, /api/rides/my route ordering vs /api/rides/{id} 404). Frontend (mobile 390x844): login shows 'GoPool' brand + car icon (no EcoRide / no forest imagery), Home shows greeting + 'Where to today?' + 4 quick action cards (Find/Offer/Schedule/My Impact) + Upcoming Ride card + Rides Near You + 'Your Green Impact' banner, Search has Find/Offer segmented tabs, From/To inputs, filter chips, recent searches, popular routes, results render with RideCard, My Rides has Upcoming(2)/Past segmented tabs with counts and Message buttons (chat opens), Profile shows big avatar with verified badge, Sarah Chen, rating·rides meta, Eco Champion level bar, Total Rides + CO₂ Saved 2-up grid, badges row, menu items, Log Out, GoPool v1.0.0 footer, Chats tab is REMOVED. ride/[id] detail and chat/[chatId] still navigate correctly. 0 console errors.

issues: RN-Web 'shadow* style props deprecated. Use boxShadow' warnings still present in Expo logs — non-blocking.

action_items: (Optional) Migrate StyleSheet shadow* props to boxShadow to silence RN-Web deprecation warnings
critical_code_review_comments: Route ordering correct: /api/rides/my is declared BEFORE /api/rides/{ride_id} in server.py (lines 305 vs 339) — verified by tests that 'my' resolves and unknown ids 404.
/api/rides/my correctly bucketes upcoming (departure_time>=now and status!=cancelled) vs past, attaches role + chat_id, sorts upcoming asc / past desc.
App still titled 'EcoRide API' in FastAPI title (cosmetic) — could be renamed to 'GoPool API' for consistency with the rebrand. Non-blocking.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_ecoride.py (added TestMyRides class with 4 tests + made booking test resilient to seat-exhaustion across reruns)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all critical flows verified — login, home, search, my rides upcoming/past, profile, ride detail, chat)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data required. Pre-existing seed (4 users, 1 admin, 4 rides) used. Booking test now picks first ride with seats>0 to be idempotent across runs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_ecoride.py -v` for full backend regression (21 tests). Frontend uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. Login pre-fills sarah.driver@ecoride.app/password123. Mobile viewport 390x844. Key testIDs verified: login-submit, home-search-bar, home-upcoming, home-ride-<id>, action-Find Ride / Offer Ride / Schedule / My Impact, tab-find/tab-offer, search-from/search-to/search-submit, search-ride-<id>, tab-upcoming/tab-past, myride-<id>, myride-message-<id>, logout-btn. Chats tab is intentionally removed and replaced by My Rides.
rca_of_issue: N/A — all features working as specified.
